name: 慈濟的故事(臺北的第二個家 、感念臺北因緣 、講藥師經結緣)

extensions.name: 愛善傳承締祥和
notes: Adjusted the conclusion to emphasize the longstanding bond between the Master and Lin's mother, framing the story as an example of members of the Dharma family caring for one another.
Remember to include the closing phrase "Let's take a listen" at the end.

extensions.name: 愛滿地慈少畢典
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 愛滿地慈少畢典 2:12

extensions.name: 守護花東聚善能
notes: Added background information identifying Dr. Hsu Ren-jun as director of the Cancer Center at Hualien Tzu Chi Hospital.

extensions.name: 賴索托冬令
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 賴索托冬令 2:11 (請寫完小編文再開始做)

extensions.name: 瓜照顧戶複查
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 瓜照顧戶複查 0:42

notes: Number selected images when more than one image is included.
Expanded the opening with more context and placed non-spoken introductory wording in parentheses.
Looked up prior Humanistic Bodhi materials to understand the event background before translating this Tzu Chi history segment.
Gave Lee Shih-hsien a clearer first introduction and used "my Master" with a capital M for the speaker's teacher.
Restored the idea that Lee Shih-hsien was determined to follow the Master on the Bodhisattva Path.
Flagged the Hualien forest office wording as a note or source detail that should be labeled clearly or removed.
Avoided calling Mr. Zheng director of Hualien's Forest District Office because the exact early Hualien forestry unit may be more specific.
Reworked 克難 to describe Tzu Chi's early lack of resources more concretely instead of using the abstract phrase "Tzu Chi's hardships."
Clarified the phone-call anecdote so the volunteer, the Master, the volunteer's father, and the Master's mother are not confused.
Changed the telephone wording from donating a phone to installing one because the next lines discuss utility poles and phone lines.
Numbered selected images and reconsidered the first image because its connection to the title, summary, and content was not clear.
Added parentheses around the opening bridge because the first sentence is a good contextual introduction rather than directly spoken content.
Consolidated repeated source citations and kept the supporting reference material together instead of splitting one source across several entries.
Added clearer Huayen Lotus Society sourcing and used Venerable for Venerable Nan Ting.
Made 道場 terminology more consistent and clarified the first mention of the seventh-floor space.
Reworked Lee Qing-po's offer so the English does not awkwardly follow the Chinese "No."
Replaced "joking" with wording that presents the Master as sharing the story in a lighter tone.
Clarified the transition so Lee Qing-po and Hu Yu-zhu are not confused as the first person who drove the Master.
Corrected the romanization of Hu Yu-zhu's name.
Reworked the Medicine Buddha Sutra passage to refer to talks during the hospital-building period and to use "talks" instead of "lectures."
Removed the extra space after the question in the Chinese summary.
Numbered selected images and avoided using an AI-edited historical photo that changed the color of the Master's robe.
Improved line breaks so the slow narration around the seventh-floor window and lecture hall entrance reads more naturally.
Restored the idea that the Buddha-Dharma should be shared in this world and avoided the unclear phrase "the people living here."
Replaced "these senior Tzu Chi leaders" with wording about senior volunteers who took on leadership responsibilities.
Added a comma after "during that time."
Clarified that the Medicine Buddha Sutra text refers to the Master's collected talks from different periods, not all commentaries.
Reworked the summaries so the hospital-building context is introduced before mentioning eastern Taiwan medical care.
sourceText: Alex Chen接下來請Alex翻譯 慈濟的故事(臺北的第二個家 、感念臺北因緣 、講藥師經結緣)，長24分48秒，預計做19小時51分，由6/12（五）15:00起算，deadline為6/17(三) 9:51，謝謝。

name: 3集日日有新知 (如何讓蘋果更耐旱＋現代人都驚嘆的2500年前宇宙觀＋少睡多讀成績好?)
notes: Added the speaker's self-introduction because there is sufficient subtitle time here and recurring speakers in this series can often be identified from earlier episodes.
Replaced "stars" with a more general term because the speaker is using 星星 loosely here and the examples include planets, which are not actually stars.
Softened the phrasing about our worries to reflect the speaker's positive intent of making them feel lighter rather than implying our lives or actions are unimportant.
sourceText: 請 Alex Chen 翻譯3集日日有新知，預計做7小時12分鐘，從6/18(四) 08:41開始算，deadline為6/18 (四)16:53，謝謝~

name: 心靈講座(在不確定中走出確定 - 童子賢) 4 個短版

extensions.name: 聞法造福淨心靈
notes: Added a time marker so the introduction could bring in Tzu Chi volunteers from Central and South America more smoothly and broaden the overall scope.

extensions.name: 弘揚佛法共成就
notes: Added the date because Dharma tour pieces are published quickly and participating Tzu Chi volunteers may be eager to see them soon after the event.
Reworked the introduction to specify that this talk was for the Taipei Buddha Bathing Ceremony team and to credit different volunteer groups in a style closer to the Chinese introduction.
Replaced "I never socialize" with wording about avoiding business social events so 不應酬 does not imply avoiding social interaction in general.
Reworked the sentence structure to restore the specific examples of meeting clients, talking to vendors, and checking construction without making the subtitles feel too rushed.
sourceText: 請 Alex Chen 翻譯 心靈講座(在不確定中走出確定 - 童子賢) 4 個短版, 長度35分, 預計翻譯28時(3天4時), 從6/18（四）16:53起算, deadline 為6/25(四)11:53, 謝謝！

name: 人文講堂(醫生到我家 - 呂立) 4 個短版

extensions.name: 視病如親暖杏林
notes: Reworked the introduction and summary to more closely reflect the episode's spoken content.

extensions.name: Reducing Brain Age to Prevent Dementia (人文講堂 - 養腦 防失智 - 曾文毅 [2])
extensions.sourceText:
2.	7/22(三)發 alex
Reducing Brain Age to Prevent Dementia (人文講堂 - 養腦 防失智 - 曾文毅 [2])
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LA76bSzLVgE&t=280s
notes: Reworked the expert introduction to replace a formal academic title with a clearer description for general readers.
Added the name of the featured speaker to the hashtags.
Simplified the long-term care sentence so it does not overstate health maintenance and keeps the focus on home healthcare.
Restored the opening point that children are a unique patient group before mentioning pediatric home care experience.
Removed tracheostomy from the ventilator sentence and used may eventually to show this is a possible future outcome.
Rephrased the birth-related tracheostomy sentence so it does not imply the child was born with a tracheostomy.
Changed numbers over ten to Arabic numerals, such as using 20 instead of twenty.
Reworked the Japanese home healthcare system sentence so the main point is about the system rather than Japan as a whole.
Reworked the case manager explanation so the ending emphasizes seamless continuity of care.
sourceText: 請 Alex Chen 翻譯人文講堂(醫生到我家 - 呂立) 4 個短版, 長度22分, 預計做17時36分(2天1時36分), 從6/26（五）09:43起算，deadline為6/30(二) 11:19，謝謝！

name: 大愛學漢醫（陽虛 血瘀 痰濕體質 防癌方法）

extensions.name: 菲獨立日義診
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 菲獨立日義診 3:29

extensions.name: 瓜靜思語發放併
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 瓜靜思語發放併 1:11

notes: Removed TCM from the opening doctor title so the super reads more naturally.
Changed lower back and knee pain to lower back and knee weakness because 痠軟 refers to soreness with weakness rather than pain.
Reworked the post-surgery treatment sentence so the patient is clearly the one being told to avoid raw and cold foods.
Clarified that the patient worried a new liver cyst might become metastasis, not that the original metastasis had already returned.
Kept the full herb name because dropping part of a plant name can point to a different species, and noted that Fo-ti is the more common English name for 何首烏.
Reworked the summary to attribute the cancer-risk explanation to Dr. Chuang rather than to Traditional Chinese medicine as a whole.
Changed the section title because the segment discusses yang deficiency, blood stasis, and phlegm-dampness rather than only yang deficiency.
Changed the herb description to say it works gently rather than suggesting it warms the body.
sourceText: 請 Alex Chen 翻譯大愛學漢醫（陽虛 血瘀 痰濕體質 防癌方法），片長12分，預計做9小時36分，從6/30（二）15:09起算，deadline為 7/1 (三) 16:45，謝謝~

name: 心靈講座 (美感修行：當代人文行者的追尋 - 姚仁祿 姚仁喜  姚仁恭) 6個短版

extensions.name: 善用此生厚美德
notes: Adjusted Tzu Chi branch names to use country or U.S. state names, not city or Taiwan-based forms such as Tzu Chi Tainan or Tzu Chi Taiwan.

extensions.name: All About Health - When Liver Disease Goes Unnoticed (大愛醫生館 - 雲霧肝癌)
extensions.sourceText:
1.	7/28(二)發 alex
All About Health - When Liver Disease Goes Unnoticed (大愛醫生館 - 雲霧肝癌)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=47tbzXquNm8
notes: Built the post around the episode's patient case and key message instead of relying mainly on outside context.
Mentioned World Hepatitis Day only briefly as the occasion rather than making it central to the content.

extensions.name: 巴東方市訪長者
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 巴東方市訪長者 1:19

extensions.name: 提娃那西語見習
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 提娃那西語見習 2:04

extensions.name: 守護天使食堂
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 守護天使食堂 1:47

notes: Adjusted the freedom line so it says the parents let them do whatever they wanted rather than repeating that they trusted them.
Identified the roundabout as likely Taipei Circle because the speaker appears to be referring to 建成圓環.
Simplified the embroidery sentence to say their mother did embroidery.
Rephrased 不務正業跑去唱歌 in a more colloquial way instead of saying he neglected his profession.
Removed the false start about the plane so the sentence focuses on waking up at night and being unable to fall back asleep.
Combined the lines about moving moments into one sentence because the Mandarin expresses it as a single idea.
Used "Please be more mindful" for 多用心 and clarified the snack-related wordplay in parentheses.
Restored the dropped meaning that the piano leasing company may have taken advantage of her before she ended up with a faulty piano.
sourceText: 請 Alex Chen 翻譯 心靈講座 (美感修行：當代人文行者的追尋 - 姚仁祿 姚仁喜  姚仁恭) 6個短版,  長度33分, 預計翻譯26時30分(3天2時30分), 從7/2（四）14:55起算, deadline 為7/8(三)8:25, 謝謝！

name: 人文講堂 (從閱讀到行動 - 莊勝翔) 3個短版

extensions.name: 付出為功歸己德
notes: Refocused the post on Dr. Lin Hui-chen's personal journey, including her gratitude, Dr. Tsai Tsung-hsien's inspiration, and the strength she found through Tzu Chi free clinics.
Removed the Master's teaching from the introduction so the post stays a human-interest story and ends with "Let's hear her story."

extensions.name: Chinese Medicine Clinic - Acupressure to Boost Lactation (看中醫 - 產後穴道按摩)
extensions.sourceText:
1. 8/1(六)發 alex
Chinese Medicine Clinic - Acupressure to Boost Lactation (看中醫 - 產後穴道按摩)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gDZ6IRtXX8s
notes: Changed the opening from a general pregnancy and Chinese medicine introduction to an audience-focused hook about common breastfeeding challenges.
Clarified that the doctor shares acupressure points that may support milk production and smoother breastfeeding.
Updated the hashtags to better match the video's focus on postpartum care, breastfeeding, and acupressure.
Combined the reading-ability lines so the English clearly says the ability to read has never been the problem.
Changed the punctuation after the setbacks and conflict clause from a period to a comma.
Simplified the sentence about thinking so the English stays closer to the plain Mandarin wording.
Changed self-affirmation to give yourself credit because 肯定自己 refers to recognizing one's own efforts here.
Reworked the future-planning sentence to better match the ideas of where to work, who to spend time with, and what kind of life to create.
Smoothed the one-year-later hypothetical so the timing reads more naturally in English.
Clarified 本來 as what the viewer would have done before, not what they are about to do now.
sourceText: 請 Alex Chen 翻譯人文講堂 (從閱讀到行動 - 莊勝翔) 3個短版, 長度23分, 預計翻譯18時30分(2天2時30分), 從7/8（三）16:15起算, deadline 為7/13(一)9:45, 謝謝！

name: 大愛全紀實 (好好吃飯) 4 個短版
notes: Simplified the teeth-related phrasing because the Mandarin leaves the detail implicit and difficulty chewing covers the point more naturally.
Changed the grandfather-in-bed line from heartbreaking to feeling helpless so it stays closer to 有一點無力.
Restored the point that Ge Wei-cheng entered long-term care graduate studies before joining his family's facility.
Reworked the restaurant program line to emphasize building a communication channel between restaurants and diners, not only meeting diners' needs.
sourceText: 請  Alex Chen 翻譯大愛全紀實 (好好吃飯) 4 個短版, 長度21分, 預計翻譯16時48分(2天48分), 從7/14（二）13:55起算, deadline 為7/16(四)14:43, 謝謝！

name: 人文講堂 (獨創思考力 創造影響力 - 洪震宇) 3個短版

extensions.name: 委內瑞拉發放
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 委內瑞拉發放 1:29

extensions.name: 約堡冬令發放
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 約堡冬令發放 1:11

extensions.name: 傳承醫道暖杏林
notes: Changed the nurse's story to emphasize passing on the care she received ("extend that same care to others") rather than only becoming a nurse.
Changed the Master's encouragement from "professionalism" to "expertise" to better fit the medical context.

extensions.name: 歡喜讚歎菩薩行
notes: Changed the volunteer description to be shorter and more direct, changing "willingly taking on various duties and caring for Jing Si Hall as if it were their own home" to "taking on various duties and treating the Jing Si Hall like their own home."
Changed the Master's message to focus more specifically on learning about Tzu Chi volunteers' work around the world instead of the broader idea of "understanding Tzu Chi's mission."

extensions.name: 保和幸福家園
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 保和幸福家園 1:34

sourceText: 請 Alex Chen  翻譯人文講堂 (獨創思考力 創造影響力 - 洪震宇) 3個短版, 長度20分, 預計翻譯16時(2天), 從7/16（四）14:43起算, deadline 為7/20(一)14:43, 謝謝！

extensions.name: 提娃那社區環保
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 提娃那社區環保 2:49
